reviews.review_title: this is a 2 player multiplayer game
reviews.review_description:
The developer here. This is a 2 player local game. There is no option for a single player game. Please, consider not to play it if you don't plan to play it with 2 players. 
You can play against smartphone if you don't have 2 Quest. Both Google Play (Android) and Apple Store(IOS) are supported.  Just look for the name of the game in that stores. 
Thanks for your consideration.
